evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.expected_output: Skill 'go-performance' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.expected_output: 技能 'go-performance' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出
expectations: 正确触发了 go-performance 技能

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: Which of my recent posts performed best and why?
evals.expected_output: Skill 'go-performance' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to go-performance skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: analyze my content performance. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
